name: command-wallet
description: Allows users to register their wallets to collect rewards.

wallet.description: Register your wallet address for payments. Use '/wallet unset' to unlink your wallet.

walletAddress.description: Wallet address or ENS name to register for payouts.

unset.description: Set to true to unlink the currently registered wallet.

registerWalletWithVerification.description: Validate an Ethers signed message from the user to verify their wallet address
